title: Gran Campo Nevado
summary: The Gran Campo Nevado is a small ice field located in the southern portion of the Muñoz Gamero Peninsula, in Chile. It covers an area of approximately 200 km2 (77 sq mi) and feeds 19 outlet glaciers, the largest of which is 15 km (9.3 mi) long.
text: The Gran Campo Nevado is a small ice field located in the southern portion of the Muñoz Gamero Peninsula, in Chile. It covers an area of approximately 200 km2 (77 sq mi) and feeds 19 outlet glaciers, the largest of which is 15 km (9.3 mi) long.
